productDisplayName: Disney Kids Boy's Pooh And Tiger Red Kidswear
description: CompositionRed t-shirt in 100% cotton with Winnie the Pooh and Tigger print on white upper panel and blue stitch detailing along sleeve and shirt hemsWash care1. Machine wash in cold water with gentle cycle using mild detergent2. Wash dark colours seperately3. Do not bleach4. Do not soak or wring5. Dry inside-out6. Do not tumble dry7. Do not iron on print and studsFittingComfort FitThis cheerful red shirt from disney is perfect for your little prince. Pooh and Tigger will keep him company while he romps around in the park or runs around with his friends. The cotton top will keep your little one comfortably dry and looks great when teamed up with denim shorts or three quarters for an enjoyable outing. Add on a pair of footwear from the crocs collection available at myntra to give your handsome young man a comfortable yet stylish look.
